title: Uppu Huli Khara
desc: When a police officer is tasked with solving the case of a bank robbery, the investigation leads her to three young men. Soon, the case gains unexpected media attention causing complications.

title: Natasaarvabhowma
desc: An investigative journalist, Gagan, moves to Bengaluru and ends up living in a supposedly haunted house. Soon, he realises a change in his behaviour after falling prey to supernatural activities.

title: Pailwaan
desc: A coach on the hunt for a new fighter finds Krishna, an orphan mentored by Sarkar. Krishna evolves into Kichcha, making a name for himself in the boxing ring.

title: Kona
desc: Narayana and his prophetic robot discover a remote village bound by an age-old sacrificial rite. Soon, he uncovers a sinister secret trapping the villagers in an endless cycle of past and present.

title: Martin
desc: In a twist of fate, a man trying to defend his motherland encounters his doppelganger, who turns out to be his deadliest foe to date.
